criteria.criterion: `scripts/check_build_env_locked.py` canonicalizes every package name with PEP 503 normalization (`re.sub(r"[-_.]+", "-", name).lower()`) on BOTH the lock and freeze sides before comparing

A regression test in `tests/unit/test_check_build_env_locked.py` fails before fix and passes after: lock with `jaraco-classes==3.4.0` and freeze with `jaraco.classes==3.4.0` accepted as lock-consistent (`main([...]) == 0`), and a genuine version mismatch on a normalized name still fails

citation.description: Ticket comment by Joe Oakhart: 'change 731 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/731, commit a7ea420b8) got LLM-Review+1 AND Verified+1 (CI run 29467397310), submitted -> MERGED to main. 7/7 test_check_build_env_locked green; lint+typecheck clean. Re-dispatched release run 29468059472 Build distributions (build-once) job PASSED; PyPI 0.8.0 published.'

criteria.criterion: `make lint && make typecheck && make test` pass, and re-dispatching `release.yml` from `main` with `version=0.8.0` gets past the build's env-lock guard
